releases.author: AgileSmagile
releases.description:
Initial release.

Moves graph node labels above nodes so an enlarged mouse pointer does not obscure them.

**Features:**
- 2D graph (Pixi.js): labels moved above nodes, distance slider, optional colour override
- 3D graph (obsidian-3d-graph): persistent labels moved above nodes via sprite y-offset
- 3D graph hover tooltip repositioned above cursor via CSS snippet

See README for installation and usage.
releases.name: v1.0.0
